summary: Tested Owner Ledger fix for Titu's JAMA entries and party clear button functionality. All backend API tests passed (10/10). Frontend UI tests confirmed both bugs are fixed.
critical_code_review_comments: The fix correctly implements $and/$or query for owner ledger views combining account=owner and cash/bank entries
Auto-ledger entries are properly excluded using reference NOT REGEX ^auto_ledger:
Frontend effectiveType() correctly flips txn_type only for account=owner entries
X clear button now resets both category AND party_type as expected
seed_data_creation: Created and cleaned up test transaction for owner expense verification
context_for_next_testing_agent: Owner ledger fix verified. Titu's ledger shows combined entries from account=owner (owner_name=Titu) and account=cash/bank (category=Titu, party_type=Owner). The X clear button properly resets party_type filter allowing search for other parties like MBOPL.

backend_api_tests: test_owner_ledger_returns_combined_entries - PASSED: GET /api/cash-book with category=Titu&party_type=Owner returns both owner and cash/bank entries
test_owner_ledger_txn_type_not_flipped_at_api - PASSED: API returns raw txn_type (frontend handles flip)
test_owner_ledger_pdf_export - PASSED: PDF export returns valid PDF >2KB
test_owner_ledger_excel_export - PASSED: Excel export returns valid xlsx
test_create_owner_expense_and_verify - PASSED: Created owner expense appears in Titu's ledger
test_non_owner_party_query - PASSED: Non-owner queries work normally
test_query_without_category - PASSED: Queries without category return all txns
test_query_with_date_range - PASSED: Date range filtering works
test_verify_titu_data_exists - PASSED: Titu's test data exists
test_get_owner_accounts - PASSED: Owner accounts API returns list
frontend_ui_tests: Login and navigate to Cash Book & Ledgers - PASSED
Party Ledgers tab shows Titu's combined entries - PASSED
Cash entries with category=Titu show as Jama (green) - PASSED
Owner entries show with Owner badge - PASSED
X clear button resets party_type to All Types - PASSED
After clearing Titu, MBOPL can be searched - PASSED

bug_1_titu_jama_not_showing.description: Titu's owner ledger now shows BOTH account=owner entries AND cash/bank entries with category=Titu
bug_1_titu_jama_not_showing.evidence: UI shows 5 transactions including Cash received from Titu (₹1,00,000 and ₹50,000) and Owner payment entries

bug_2_party_type_stuck_on_owner.description: After clicking X to clear Titu, party_type resets to All Types and other parties can be searched
bug_2_party_type_stuck_on_owner.evidence: After clearing Titu, typing MBOPL shows MBOPL entries with BP Sale party type in dropdown
